cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: abundance, prosperity, security, ambitious, safe, kind, patriarchal, protective, businessman, provider, sensual, reliable

cards.name: Ⅴ The Hierophant, reversed
cards.interpretation: rebellion, unconventionality, non-conformity, new methods, ignorance

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative
